questions.question: What is the most basic digital component that implements a Boolean function, typically having one or more inputs and a single output?

In a pipelined processor, which type of hazard occurs when the pipeline is unable to fetch the correct instruction sequence due to a conditional branch instruction whose outcome (taken or not taken) is not known until late in the pipeline?
In the context of Design for Testability (DFT) for digital integrated circuits, what is the primary role of Automatic Test Pattern Generation (ATPG)?
options: To automatically synthesize the Register-Transfer Level (RTL) code into a gate-level netlist.
To generate a sequence of input vectors that can detect potential manufacturing defects (faults) in the circuit.
To optimize the power consumption of the design during physical implementation.
To verify the functional correctness of the design using formal methods.
To determine the critical path delay of the circuit for timing closure.

questions.question: In multi-processor computer architectures, which memory consistency model guarantees that the result of any execution is the same as if all operations from all processors were executed in some sequential order, and the operations of each individual processor appear in that sequence in the order specified by its program?

During the physical verification phase of an integrated circuit design, which analysis is primarily focused on identifying potential electrical issues such as floating nets, shorts between power/ground domains, or incorrect power/ground connections, which are not typically caught by Design Rule Checking (DRC) or Layout Versus Schematic (LVS)?
